response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile engineer with genuine IDE-development experience (C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI, a C IDE) and excellent software-craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, teaching). However, the role's core requirements—deep JVM expertise, strong Kotlin, and the Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate enterprise ecosystem—are essentially absent. Java appears only peripherally (robotic arms, device orchestration) and Kotlin and Spring are nowhere in the resume. His primary depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not map to enterprise JVM tooling.
strengths: Real IDE/developer-tooling experience (C IDE at National Instruments, AI-agent tooling at re:cinq)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing focus
Broad systems experience including low-latency, high-throughput services
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, which are central requirements
Java exposure is shallow and peripheral; no evidence of deep JVM internals knowledge
Primary expertise (TypeScript/Node, DLang) is off-target for an enterprise JVM IDE role
